setup: T7 discriminator: 1 ordinary Lv 7.0 Infantry attacker (all hero slots vacant) vs 1 FC1 T1 Infantry defender led by Vulcanus only - the 16:17:06 T6 discriminator rerun at T7, isolating G_w(Inf,7) from the Gatot-dealer effect seen in the 151127 battle.

assumptions: S2 (1-unit side): 12 triggers => turns in [72, 77]; intersection [75, 77]

stats_capture.notes: identical no-hero loadout to the 20260718_161706 T6 discriminator

troop_passives_active.reason: defender fields no Lancers; always-on (not a proc) - T7 Infantry stays Type 1

stats_capture.notes: same FC1 T1 Inf loadout as the T6 discriminator; MM panels carry the Vulcanus aura (hero assigned)

hero_skills.name: Vulcanus Skill 1
hero_skills.effect: -4% enemy Troops Attack, once at battle start (L1 scale; level not shown)

hero_skills.name: Vulcanus Skill 2
hero_skills.effect: +20% damage every 6th attack event of its side (L1 scale; level not shown)

hero_skills.name: True Strike
hero_skills.effect: per proc (turns 3,6,9,...): -12% enemy Infantry/Lancer Defense for 3 turns AND +12% own Marksmen's Attack for 1 turn (L1 scale; level not shown)

troop_passives_active.reason: attacker fields no Lancers (Infantry mirror - passive-free)

notes: T7 DISCRIMINATOR (pairs with 20260718_161706): same attacker loadout at T7 instead of T6, same defender. Battle report banner shows DEFEAT from the defender's perspective; casualties are unambiguous (defender injured 1/survivors 0, attacker unscathed).
G_w(Inf,7) FIRST MEASUREMENT: t = 12.524 x (135.13)/(331.35 x 0.96) x G_w(7) = 5.321 x G_w(7); observed [75,77] => G_w(Inf,7) = 14.1-14.5 (cube-root extrapolant 13.2 was -8% low).

CONSEQUENCE for the 151127 reverse-race battle: with G_w(7) ~ 14.2 the un-aura'd-Gatot-led T7's kill clock predicts ~152 turns vs observed >599 - the ~4x Gatot-dealer slowdown is REAL physics, not a G_w extrapolation error (this battle controls tier, base, panels, and target).
Attacker fought from a different position (X:763 Y:482) than the earlier same-day battles (X:769 Y:476) - recorded as shown.
kills read from Battle Details rows (attacker 1 / defender 0), cross-checked by the casualty identity.
